name: Multilingual Semantic Bridge
description: Automatic trigger layer for cases where one phrasing, synonym, or language variant would otherwise miss the right technical target. Best used together with the Multilingual Semantic Bridge skill.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the multilingual bridge plugin.

testTrigger.description: Optional force-fire trigger used for validation turns.

debug.description: When true, log structured activation details for validation and troubleshooting.
